summary: Fixed two tester 🟡 findings from run_1: (1) added dispatch-ordering assertion to the stale+ready coexistence test — now asserts that recovered stale item #3 is dispatched before item #4 via dispatchedIssueNumber tracking in the setProjectItemStatus mock; (2) added a CLI subprocess integration test for `agt cron-setup` in a new describe block that runs `node agt.mjs cron-setup` and asserts the printed crontab line includes `cd`, `.team/cron.log`, and `2>&1`. All 558 tests pass.
